actions.value:
Our prior ACH and OTC provider, Kado.money, has informed us that they have been acquired by a different company and are no longer able to provide exchange services within Edge. We apologize for any inconvenience.

 

You may proceed to make a purchase order by selecting another payment method in the Buy area of the app.

 

When we find a replacement OTC provider, we will reinstate the 'OTC / Bank Wire' payment option back into the app. If you have any other questions, please let us know.

You may proceed to make a purchase order by selecting another payment method in the Buy area of the app.
 
When we find a replacement OTC provider, we will reinstate the 'OTC / Bank Wire' payment option back into the app. If you have any other questions, please let us know.
